# Backlog — demo

Synthetic backlog used by `bin/fleet kickstart --demo`. The two rows
below mirror the frontmatter of the two ticket files in this directory.

## Index

| id | title | priority | status | area |
|----|-------|----------|--------|------|
| 0001 | demo hello world (the ship agent picks this first) | P1 | groomed | docs |
| 0002 | demo second ticket (waits behind 0001) | P2 | proposed | docs |
